title: GAMBLING COBBLEMON
description: Cobblemon always lacked something, and now it's perfect. GAMBLEEE. (If you put a relic coin in fossil revival thing it gives a random pokemon lol)
body:
# GAMBLE IN COBBLEMON WOOOO
# _**HOW TO GAMBLE???**_
To gamble you have to put a relic coin in the fossil analyzer and revive it (just like you would when reviving normal fossil pokemon) and it will make a random pokemon!!!\
p.s. this is a joke datapack I made cause why not lol just have fun ig if you actually want to use it in an actual cobblemon world/server
### Disclaimer
Don't actually gamble irl it's really bad only gamble in cobblemon please
